description: Legal fragment. In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100–1138 CE). Mentions a man and his cousin (ibn ʿamm); 51 dinars; and something granted to the orphan daughter of Avraham. Dated: [141]8, [142]8, [143]8, or [144]8 Seleucid, which correspond to 1106/7 1116/17, 1126/27, or 1136/37 CE.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
